title: Instructional Coordinators
description: Develop instructional material, coordinate educational content, and incorporate current technology into instruction in order to provide guidelines to educators and instructors for developing curricula and conducting courses. May train and coach teachers. Includes educational consultants and specialists, and instructional material directors.

tasks.text: Observe work of teaching staff to evaluate performance and to recommend changes that could strengthen teaching skills.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Plan and conduct teacher training programs and conferences dealing with new classroom procedures, instructional materials and equipment, and teaching aids.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interpret and enforce provisions of state education codes and rules and regulations of state education boards.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Conduct or participate in workshops, committees, and conferences designed to promote the intellectual, social, and physical welfare of students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise teaching and administrative staff in curriculum development, use of materials and equipment, and implementation of state and federal programs and procedures.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Advise and teach students.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend, order, or authorize purchase of instructional materials, supplies, equipment, and visual aids designed to meet student educational needs and district standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Update the content of educational programs to ensure that students are being trained with equipment and processes that are technologically current.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Address public audiences to explain program objectives and to elicit support.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Research, evaluate, and prepare recommendations on curricula, instructional methods, and materials for school systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Prepare grant proposals, budgets, and program policies and goals or assist in their preparation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Prepare or approve manuals, guidelines, and reports on state educational policies and practices for distribution to school districts.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Coordinate activities of workers engaged in cataloging, distributing, and maintaining educational materials and equipment in curriculum libraries and laboratories.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Adapt instructional content or delivery methods for different levels or types of learners.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Analyze performance data to determine effectiveness of instructional systems, courses, or instructional materials.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Assess effectiveness and efficiency of instruction according to ease of instructional technology use and student learning, knowledge transfer, and satisfaction.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Conduct needs assessments and strategic learning assessments to develop the basis for curriculum development or to update curricula.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Define instructional, learning, or performance objectives.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design instructional aids for stand-alone or instructor-led classroom or online use.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Design learning products, including Web-based aids or electronic performance support systems.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop instructional materials, such as lesson plans, handouts, or examinations.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop master course documentation or manuals according to applicable accreditation, certification, or other requirements.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop measurement tools to evaluate the effectiveness of instruction or training interventions.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Edit instructional materials, such as books, simulation exercises, lesson plans, instructor guides, and tests.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Interview subject-matter experts or conduct other research to develop instructional content.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Present and make recommendations regarding course design, technology, and instruction delivery options.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Provide analytical support for the design and development of training curricula, learning strategies, educational policies, or courseware standards.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Recommend changes to curricula or delivery methods, based on information such as instructional effectiveness data, current or future performance requirements, feasibility, and costs.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Research and evaluate emerging instructional technologies or methods.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Teach instructors to use instructional technology or to integrate technology with teaching.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
